function.name: scheduleConsultation
function.description: Call this tool whenever a customer requests to speak with a consultant or requests any type of consultation, regardless of the topic or reason. This is the primary tool for all consultation and agent-connection requests.

contact_number.description: Phone number to call the customer back

preferred_datetime.description: Preferred date and time for the callback (e.g., 'tomorrow at 2 PM')

topic.description: Topic or issue the customer wants to discuss

function.name: updatePersonalInformation
function.description: Update a customer's personal information stored in their account, including password reset, name change, address change, and other account details.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number for identification

new_value.description: The new value to set for the specified field

function.name: changePlan
function.description: Look up, change, or enroll in a mobile or internet service plan for the customer's account.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number

plan_name.description: The name or type of the plan (e.g., '5G unlimited', 'family bundle')

function.name: reportLostOrStolenDevice
function.description: Report a lost or stolen device to suspend service, reissue a SIM card, cancel a report, or inquire about compensation procedures.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number

device_info.description: Description or model of the device

function.name: inquireBilling
function.description: Look up billing details, explain charges, request a billing statement, or handle payment-related requests such as installment plans.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number

period.description: The billing period to look up (e.g., 'this month', 'last month', '2024-06')

function.name: subscribeAddOnService
function.description: Subscribe to or cancel an add-on service for the customer's account, such as caller ID, voicemail, insurance, or content subscriptions.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number

service_name.description: Name or type of the add-on service (e.g., 'caller ID', 'device insurance', 'streaming bundle')

function.name: activateNewDevice
function.description: Process a new device activation or line opening for a customer, including plan selection and SIM registration.

device_model.description: Model name of the device to activate

plan_name.description: The plan to enroll with the new device

function.name: applyRoaming
function.description: Apply for, modify, or cancel international roaming service for a customer's account.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number

destination.description: The country or region the customer is traveling to

travel_period.description: The travel dates or duration (e.g., '2024-08-01 to 2024-08-10')

function.name: requestNumberPortability
function.description: Process a number portability request to transfer a customer's existing phone number from another carrier to KT.

phone_number.description: The phone number to be transferred

plan_name.description: The KT plan the customer wants to enroll in after transfer

function.name: cancelPlan
function.description: Process a plan cancellation or service termination request for a customer's account.

account_id.description: The customer's account ID or phone number

reason.description: Reason for cancellation (e.g., 'switching carrier', 'no longer needed', 'cost')

effective_date.description: Requested date for the cancellation to take effect
